# vector: enum_resp_2entries
# ENUM_RESP: total 10, page contains user vel_kp param/scope and system iq_meas scope
# raw  = frame before COBS (ver|type|flags|seq|len|payload|crc32c, all LE)
# wire = COBS(raw) + 0x00 delimiter, the actual SCI-link octets
raw: 59830003003e000a000000020076656c5f6b70000000000000000000000400070012a000000100000069715f6d6561730000000000000000000000020044a000000100000042fac77f
wire: 0359830203023e020a010102020776656c5f6b70010101010101010101020402070312a001020101010869715f6d6561730101010101010101010102020344a001020101010542fac77f00
